title: rubus subintegratus
intro: Rubus subintegratus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus subintegratus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and anticancer activities. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable resource for natural health remedies.
